name: AREthGetMessageId
title: AREthGetMessageId
description: This function returns the Message ID from the SOME/IP message header.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the SOME/IP message (e.g. see OnAREthMessage)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
